ami_type.description: The type of Amazon Machine Image (AMI) used by the node group.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the node group.

capacity_type.description: The capacity type of the node group, such as 'ON_DEMAND' or 'SPOT'.

disk_size.description: The disk size in gigabytes for the node group.

id.description: The ID of the node group.

instance_types.description: The list of instance types for the node group.

labels.description: A map of labels to assign to the node group.

launch_template.description: Details of the launch template used by the node group, including ID, name, and version.

node_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role assigned to the node group.

release_version.description: The release version of the node group.

remote_access.description: Configuration for remote access to the nodes, including SSH key and security group IDs.

resources.description: Details of the resources associated with the node group, such as autoscaling groups and security group ID.

scaling_config.description: The scaling configuration of the node group, including desired, maximum, and minimum sizes.

status.description: The current status of the node group.

subnet_ids.description: The IDs of the subnets associated with the node group.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the node group.

taints.description: A list of Kubernetes taints to apply to the nodes in the group.

version.description: The Kubernetes version of the node group.
